description:
The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time is a 3D action/adventure game. Travel through Hyrule in two time periods,
learn magical ocarina songs, and explore twelve dungeons on your quest. Use Link's many items and abilities
to rescue the Seven Sages, and then confront Ganondorf to save Hyrule!

9.0.0-alpha1.description:
This is the first public alpha of an update OoT Randomizer APWorld, based on the original OoTR randomizer at https://github.com/OoTRandomizer/OoT-Randomizer.

**This is an early build, please be mindful before using it in your multis.**

It is based on v9.0, which is the latest public release, and includes all new changes since the last APWorld release based on v7.1:
v8.0: major settings expansion (Key Rings give Boss Keys, Bombchu Bag/Drops, Silver Rupee Shuffle + Pouches, Trade Shuffle overhaul, Treasure Chest Game Keys, Thieves' Hideout entrance shuffle, individual Ocarina note shuffle, Gerudo Valley river exit shuffle, Loach reward shuffle, key appearance by dungeon, Ruto-at-F1, new SFX/music/cosmetic options); major hint additions (Important Checks, Frogs Ocarina Game, merchant hints, new hint distro controls like remove_stones/priority_stones, new distributions); plus custom music format/model/texture additions.
v8.1: Shuffle Wonderitems; Minor Items in Big/Gold Chests became granular multiselect; clearer rainbow bridge altar hints option; combine_trial_hints option.
v8.2: new Input Viewer; expanded chest/pot texture options including Stone of Agony unlock behavior; now-display-current-song cosmetic option; dungeon reward shuffle controls; ToT Reward from Rauru + skip control; Pre-completed Dungeons Mode: Specific Rewards; Include Empty Pots/Crates; new No Logic Weekly preset; plando password_lock; plus preset aliases, expanded plando item_hints, boss-key HUD icon, and new hint distro fields (excluded_goal_categories, one_hint_per_goal).
v8.3: new options for Ice Traps (Custom (count)/Custom (%)), hidden plandomized_locations, Shadow Temple boat speed setting, Require Lens of Truth for Treasure Chest Game, Market Big Poes hint option, Shuffle Ganon's Tower Entrance, and new Gerudo Fortress child-heart-piece behavior control.
v9.0: new special-deal price controls; Frogs 2 melody randomization option; Scarecrow Behavior (with new Fast mode); new misc hints for Deku Theater masks and 100-skull reward; Glitched logic renamed/reworked to Advanced (with many added advanced tricks/glitches); expanded Door of Time requirements; Additional Random Starting Items; and expanded map/compass info options for dungeon/boss entrances.

The OoT Adjuster has been adjusted to include all modern cosmetics settings and can now also patch models and custom music.
Models go into the data/sprites/oot/adult or /child folder of your MultiworldGG or AP installation.

Both the Patching Process and the Adjuster process will now auto start the OoT Client and Bizhawk with the connector script loaded.
Please note: Since OoT is currently not shipped as a bundled .apworld file, but unpacked by the core AP releases, you will have to delete the lib/worlds/oot folder first before adding this custom apworld.

Long term plans:

- v9.1 support once OoTR v9.1 releases in a few weeks
- Romless generation
- Maybe a different sprite for ap items  (currently a recolored triforce piece)
- Different texture for filler AP items chests/crates/pots
- Maybe showing the actual names of ap items in the textbox
- Iron out seemingly random generation fails
- Down the line: Support for VC (via new serial solution) and other Emulators

Support through the unofficial AP discord
9.0.0-alpha1.title: 9.0.0 Alpha 1

Alpha2.description:
This is the second public alpha of an updated OoT Randomizer APWorld, based on the original OoTR randomizer at https://github.com/OoTRandomizer/OoT-Randomizer.

**This is an early build, please be mindful before using it in your multis.**

Changes:

Feat:
  * Foreign Item Names now show up in item get message
  * Tinted Chests/Pots/Crates have a blue tint now, adjusted triforce

Fix:
  * Compressor and archipelago.json required hard file paths and didn't work in .apworld frozen mode (this means oot can now get removed from the non_apworlds list in setup.py)
  * Random Starting Items messed with logic in the way that items were removed from the pool

Please note: Since OoT is currently not shipped as a bundled .apworld file, but unpacked by the core AP releases, you will have to delete the lib/worlds/oot folder first before adding this custom apworld.
Alpha2.title: 9.0.0 Alpha 2

v9.1.0-alpha1.description:
This is the third public alpha of an updated OoT Randomizer APWorld, based on the original OoTR randomizer at https://github.com/OoTRandomizer/OoT-Randomizer.

This is an early build, please be mindful before using it in your multis.

Changes:

Feat:

- Update to version 9.1 (about to release in OoTR upstream)
- Emu_loader based client (thank you so much to the DK64 team) that supports Project64 (and forks), and Bizhawk
- Support for RetroArch UDP network API (allowing usage of RetroArch on MacOS)
- Auto Start from emulator of choice

Docs:

- Cleanup of mwgg references
- Docs update


Fix:

- Chest mini Game chest textures were not forced to default
- Missing Text IDs for keys in dungeons
- Crash entering Bombchu Bowling
- ToT Reward from Rauru not sending
- Dungeon Rewards not sending under certain conditions.

Please note: Since OoT is currently not shipped as a bundled .apworld file, but unpacked by the core AP&MWGG releases, you will have to delete the lib/worlds/oot folder first before adding this custom apworld.
v9.1.0-alpha1.title: v9.1.0-alpha1

v9.1.0-alpha2.description:
This is the fourth public alpha of an updated OoT Randomizer APWorld, based on the original OoTR randomizer at https://github.com/OoTRandomizer/OoT-Randomizer.

This is an early build and might still include bugs, please test it thoroughly before trusting it in your multiworlds.

Changes:

Feat:

- Emu_loader support for Gopher64 and Ares (thank you to the DK64 team!)
- Revamped adult trade shuffle options based on upstream behavior

Fix:

- Issues with reward shuffle outside the classic reward locations
- Biggoron location check with trade shuffle not triggering
- Potion shop checks not sending

Please note: Since OoT is currently not shipped as a bundled .apworld file, but unpacked by the core AP&MWGG releases, you will have to delete the lib/worlds/oot folder first before adding this custom apworld.
v9.1.0-alpha2.title: v9.1.0-alpha2

v9.1.0-alpha3.description:
This is the fifth public alpha of an updated OoT Randomizer APWorld, based on the original OoTR randomizer at https://github.com/OoTRandomizer/OoT-Randomizer.

This is an early build and might still include bugs, please test it thoroughly before trusting it in your multiworlds.

Changes:

Feat:

- Support for NTSC-J v1.0 cartridges of OoT
- client and adjuster get a dedicated name and description to visually differ from the preexisting AP clients

Chore:
- standardized manifest to meet AP requirements

Please note: Since OoT is currently not shipped as a bundled .apworld file, but unpacked by the core AP&MWGG releases, you will have to delete the lib/worlds/oot folder first before adding this custom apworld.
v9.1.0-alpha3.title: v9.1.0-alpha3

v9.1.0-alpha4.description:
This is the 6th public alpha of an updated OoT Randomizer APWorld, based on the original OoTR randomizer at https://github.com/OoTRandomizer/OoT-Randomizer.

This is an early build and might still include bugs, please test it thoroughly before trusting it in your multiworlds.

Please note: this update changed the default template.

Changes:

Feat:

- Add missing options from v9.1 that needed adjustment to adapt AP's fill algorithm (Empty dungeons, starting hearts, include empty pots/crates)


Fix:
- Prevent randomized special deal pricing to be out of order
- Ruto/Jabu Hint would crash generation if it hinted an out of world item


Chore:
- renamed a few options to be fully inline with upstream
- cleanup of remains of the old apworld


Docs:
- explanation of extra needed changes to add as apworld to AP (see below)

Please note: Since OoT is currently not shipped as a bundled .apworld file, but unpacked by the core AP releases, you will have to delete the lib/worlds/oot folder first before adding this custom apworld.
v9.1.0-alpha4.title: v9.1.0-alpha4

v9.1.0-beta1.description:
Updated OoT Randomizer APWorld, based on the original OoTR randomizer at https://github.com/OoTRandomizer/OoT-Randomizer, on par with the latest update v9.1.0.

This is a beta build and might still include bugs, please test it thoroughly before trusting it in your multiworlds.

Changes:

Fix:
- Several checks not sending (Adult Trade Shuffles, Chest Game merchant)
- Market Guard House lagging with many AP filler items in pots
- Adjuster would not patch patches off the webhost

Please note: Since OoT is currently not shipped as a bundled .apworld file, but unpacked by the core AP releases, you will have to delete the lib/worlds/oot folder first before adding this custom apworld.
v9.1.0-beta1.title: v9.1.0-beta1

v9.1.0-beta2.description:
Updated OoT Randomizer APWorld, based on the original OoTR randomizer at https://github.com/OoTRandomizer/OoT-Randomizer, on par with the latest update v9.1.0.

This is a beta build and might still include bugs, please test it thoroughly before trusting it in your multiworlds.

Options changed, so generate a new default template. Not compatible with beta-1.

Changes:

Feat:
- Voice Patching like in upstream through the Adjuster
- Full Child Trade Shuffle options
- Shuffle_dungeon_rewards restriction with boss entrance shuffle removed

Fix:
- Hylian Loach Location mismatch
- Grotto Beehives actor flag mismatch
- Freezes of client and Adjuster on start / patching
- Compass not exposing dungeon info
- Several bugs that would reduce successful generation percentage
- Special Hints for out of world items would crash generation
- Bigger consumables packs like Bombs (10) would only send out 5 of each
- Adult freestanding rupees not sending


Chore:
- Cleanup of Emu bridge layer to not required a hardcoded dungeon location list

Please note: Since OoT is currently not shipped as a bundled .apworld file, but unpacked by the core AP releases, you will have to delete the lib/worlds/oot folder first before adding this custom apworld.
v9.1.0-beta2.title: v9.1.0-beta2

v9.1.0-beta6.description:
Updated OoT Randomizer APWorld, based on the original OoTR randomizer at https://github.com/OoTRandomizer/OoT-Randomizer, on par with the latest update v9.1.0.

This is a beta build and might still include bugs, please test it thoroughly before trusting it in your multiworlds.

v9.1.0-beta7.description:
# OoT Randomizer APWorld v9.1.0-beta7 Update

Updated OoT Randomizer APWorld, based on the original OoTR randomizer at https://github.com/OoTRandomizer/OoT-Randomizer, on par with the latest update v9.1.0.

This is a beta build and might still include bugs, please test it thoroughly before trusting it in your multiworlds.


## Changes:
### Feat:
- Properly handle mmrs music files during custom music patching
- Empty Dungeons now handled properly with full accessibility

### Chore:
- Restored spawn in Bombchu Bowling after the sfx fix.

### Fix:
- Improved generation rate significantly
- Crashes in Bombchu Bowling with randomized cucco sounds
- Generation fill logic around small keyys
- Hint region fix for compass/maps with reward shuffle

Please note: Since OoT is currently not shipped as a bundled .apworld file, but unpacked by the core AP releases, you will have to delete the lib/worlds/oot folder first before adding this custom apworld.
Even after deletion, the "Open Patch" Workflow in AP currently still starts the OoT Client, even if you deleted the world. So make sure you have the correct "Ocarina of Time Client" open that references the APWorld 9.1.0 after patching, or patch directly through the new Adjuster. If your client says "Archipelago Ocarina of Time Client 0.6.x" in the top bar with no info about the apworld version, you are using the old client.
v9.1.0-beta7.title: v9.1.0-beta7

v9.1.0-beta8.description:
# OoT Randomizer APWorld v9.1.0-beta8 Update

Updated OoT Randomizer APWorld, based on the original OoTR randomizer at https://github.com/OoTRandomizer/OoT-Randomizer, on par with the latest update v9.1.0.

This is a beta build and might still include bugs, please test it thoroughly before trusting it in your multiworlds.


## Changes:
### Feat:
- Adjuster now outputs a cosmetics log
- Retroarch Bridge Traffic significantly reduced
- Add Shuffle all sfx checkbox
- Readd Specific Pot & Crate Textures settings removed during development

### Fix:
- Non-Spoiler Locations would not get patched properly
- Outdated Music Patching (pre v9) (Update should hopefully patch custom music crashes)

Please note: Since OoT is currently not shipped as a bundled .apworld file, but unpacked by the core AP releases, you will have to delete the lib/worlds/oot folder first before adding this custom apworld.
Even after deletion, the "Open Patch" Workflow in AP currently still starts the OoT Client, even if you deleted the world. So make sure you have the correct "Ocarina of Time Client" open that references the APWorld 9.1.0 after patching, or patch directly through the new Adjuster. If your client says "Archipelago Ocarina of Time Client 0.6.x" in the top bar with no info about the apworld version, you are using the old client.
v9.1.0-beta8.title: v9.1.0-beta8
